name: @gjsify/example-dom-three-geometry-cube
description: Three.js geometry cube example ported from refs/three/examples/webgl_geometry_cube.html

scripts.build: yarn build:gjs && yarn build:browser && yarn build:assets
scripts.build:assets: cp -f src/index.html dist/index.html && cp -f src/webgl.css dist/webgl.css && cp -f src/crate.gif dist/crate.gif

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
